cit.basis: IRE (Impuesto a la Renta Empresarial) flat 10% on net business income (Ley 6380/2019) — the lowest corporate income tax rate in South America.
cit.note: Administered by the DNIT (Dirección Nacional de Ingresos Tributarios). Small taxpayers may opt into the SIMPLE / RESIMPLE simplified regimes instead of the general IRE — out of scope for this SME estimator.

idu.note: IDU (Impuesto a los Dividendos y a las Utilidades) on profit distributions: 8% for resident shareholders, 15% for non-residents (Ley 6380/2019).

vat.note: IVA standard rate 10% — also the lowest standard VAT rate in South America; 5% reduced rate applies to e.g. basic-basket foodstuffs, pharmaceuticals, and real-estate transactions.

small_business_regimes.note: SIMPLE and RESIMPLE simplified regimes are available for small businesses below turnover thresholds, replacing the general IRE with simplified presumptive assessment.

effective_date_range.basis: Target ruleset/params year; jurisdiction fiscal calendars and transitional periods may differ.

rate_threshold_assumptions: Rates and thresholds are simplified for LedgerField estimates.
IDU on distributions, SIMPLE/RESIMPLE regimes, WHT, relief, filing, and sector-specific rules may alter outcomes.
Verify against official guidance and local advisor before filing or production use.
limitations: Not legal, tax, accounting, or filing advice.
Does not encode every deduction, exemption, treaty, WHT, payroll, or filing rule.
High-stakes use requires local validation against official forms and current law.
